backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the INDO KIDZ school backend, implementing user profile management, school info CRUD, fee category management, and role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the principal ID display feature (REQ-1) is implemented in frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key changes across the INDO KIDZ React application.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClient, ThemeProvider, global Toaster, and the shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a shield icon and a back-to-home button for non-admin users attempting to reach the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/Admissions: Admin form for editing and saving admissions-related content fields (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ, portal link) using textarea/input controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/Announceme: Admin UI for creating, editing, and deleting school announcements with title, body, and date fields, backed by CRUD query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactEdi: Admin form for viewing and updating school contact information (name, phone, email, address, social links, etc.) with dirty-state tracking and tooltip help text.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeeCategor: Admin component for managing fee categories, supporting add, inline edit, and delete operations with confirmation dialogs and validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin gallery manager that allows uploading images (converted to base64, max 2MB) with captions and deleting existing photos.
frontend/src/components/admin/HomeConten: Admin React component for editing the home page content including school name, tagline, stats, highlights, and testimonials, with load/save functionality via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeCusto: Admin React component for customizing site theme settings (primary/accent colors and font), offering preset color schemes and custom color pickers with save functionality.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with school branding, social media links, quick navigation links, and a contact info section including address, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar that shows nav links, login/logout, and an admin Customize button; displays an amber banner with the authenticated user's copyable Internet Identity principal ID.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that appears for authenticated users who have no profile, prompting them to enter their name and save it via the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, admin status, school info, fee categories, and various content sections.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, custom animations (fadeIn, slideUp, float, etc.), and utility classes for gradients and card hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that renders a tabbed interface for managing home content, admissions, fees, gallery, contact, announcements, and theme. Access is restricted to authenticated admin users, with loading skeletons shown during auth checks.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Admissions page that displays school admission information (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ) fetched from the backend, falling back to default content. Renders each section as a styled card with icons.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page that shows school contact details (principal, phone, email, address, social links) fetched from the backend and includes a mock contact form that toasts on submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeesPayment.tsx: Fee payment page with a form for students to submit payment requests by selecting a fee category, entering student details, and choosing a payment mode. Shows a success confirmation screen after mock submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeeStructure.tsx: Fee structure page that fetches and displays all fee categories as styled cards with gradient headers and amounts. Shows a placeholder message if no fees are available.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that displays school photos in a masonry grid fetched from the backend, with a lightbox overlay on click and a placeholder state when no photos exist.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: React homepage component for INDO KIDZ school that renders a hero section, stats, highlights, announcements, fee categories, and testimonials using data from custom query hooks with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations including float, gradient, and wiggle.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the INDO KIDZ app's current version, known issues (admin principal ID not set), existing features, and a pending action request to display the logged-in Internet Identity principal ID.
